reviews.comment:
Para los que somos viajeros de las dos ruedas, es agradable ser recibidos en una estación de servicios con un una sonrisa y ya listos para reponer combustible. Se puede pagar con cualquier medio, debíta, efectivo, lo que es una ventaja.

(Translated by Google)
For those of us who travel by motorcycle, it's nice to be greeted at a service station with a smile and ready to refuel. You can pay with any method—debit card, cash—which is a plus.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10933277104463478772/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLdnBpb013EAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place, worth praising for the cleanliness of the place, its bathrooms and the bar/restaurant it has, as well as the customer service.
